nasb.text: What I am saying is this: the Law, which came four hundred and thirty years later, does not invalidate a covenant previously ratified by God, so as to nullify the promise.

esv.text: This is what I mean: the law, which came 430 years afterward, does not annul a covenant previously ratified by God, so as to make the promise void.

cnv.text: 我要這樣說，　神預先立好的約，那四百三十年後才有的律法，不能把它廢掉，使那應許落空。

ccb.text: 我的意思是：四百三十年后颁布的律法不会废除上帝先前立下的约，以致应许落空。

csbs.text: 我说的这话是：四百三十年以后出现的律法，不能废弃神预先立好的约，使那应许无效。
